title: Official-Style Character Reference Sheet AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Official Style Character Reference Sheet AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: original sci-fi scout pilot with modular jacket, gloves, compact drone and utility belt. Scene / Context: three-view orthographic front side back, facial expressions, costume breakdown and color palette. Source Recipe Translation: official-style character reference sheet. Preserve these source mechanics: clean organized character design sheet, white background, diagram blueprint style, labeled component parts, color palette strip. Concrete social variant uses original sci-fi scout pilot with modular jacket, gloves, compact drone and utility belt in three-view orthographic front side back, facial expressions, costume breakdown and color palette. Composition: 16:9 reference-sheet layout with a center-safe crop and large hero figure readable in X preview; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: clean organized character design sheet, white background, diagram blueprint style, labeled component parts, color palette strip; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: RHEA / scout pilot reference; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
